title: OFFLINE / LOGS
subtitle: Offline field notes and mechanical pursuits.

blogs.title: The Tactile Machine
blogs.teaser_text: When I am not building web infrastructure, I am usually on a Yamaha XSR700. It serves as my introduction to mid-weight CC class machines, demanding a hands-on approach to physical mechanics. From fine-tuning the controls to long-weekend highway routing, it is the ultimate disconnect from the screen.

blogs.title: Wonders of Travel
blogs.teaser_text: I am drawn to the raw, unfiltered moments of travel. From the organized chaos of a local market to the quiet atmosphere of the landscapes of mountains, beaches, and hidden gems, I try to capture the authenticity of a place through my lens.
